'''Tonas Vueral''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tunroth]]. As a [[Tunroth Hunter]], he attained the high rank of ''[[chirlan]]'' (nineteenth), and was a renowned tracker. He often worked in the [[Anthos sector/Legends|Anthos sector]], home to many Tunroth on worlds such as [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]].
